title: 你看了什么电影？
pinyin: Nǐ kàn le shén me diàn yǐng?
description_uz: «Kecha kinoga bordingmi?» — ko'rilgan film haqida ikki do'stning suhbati. Bu dialog qanday film ko'rganini so'rash, film nima haqidaligini, uning davomiyligini va tavsiya berishni mashq qiladi. Kundalik, foydali so'zlar bilan — takrorlab o'rganish uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Ты вчера ходил в кино?» — разговор двух друзей о просмотренном фильме. Диалог тренирует, как спросить, какой фильм человек посмотрел, о чём он, сколько длится, и дать рекомендацию. Близкая тема и полезная лексика — идеально для повторения.
description_en: «Did you go to the movies yesterday?» — two friends chatting about a film. This dialogue practices asking what movie someone watched, what it's about, how long it is, and giving a recommendation. Relatable topic with useful vocabulary—perfect for repetition.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuó tiān qù kàn diàn yǐng le ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Did you go to the movies yesterday?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 是的，我看了一部新电影。
sentences.pinyin: Shì de, wǒ kàn le yí bù xīn diàn yǐng.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, men bitta yangi film ko'rdim.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes, I watched a new movie.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Kàn le shén me diàn yǐng?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: 《Nǐ hǎo, Lǐ Huànyīng》, hěn gǎn rén.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Jiǎng mā ma hé nǚ ér de gù shi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Это история о маме и дочери.
sentences.text_translation_en: It's a story about a mother and daughter.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Kū le, zhēn de hěn gǎn dòng.
sentences.text_translation_en: I did — I was really moved.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Diàn yǐng duō cháng shí jiān?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Chà bu duō liǎng ge xiǎo shí.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo kàn de huà wǒ yě qù kàn.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi bo'lsa, men ham ko'rgani boraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Если хороший, я тоже пойду посмотрю.
sentences.text_translation_en: If it's good, I'll go see it too.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 一定要看，你不会后悔的。
sentences.pinyin: Yí dìng yào kàn, nǐ bú huì hòu huǐ de.
sentences.text_translation_en: You must watch it — you won't regret it.
sentences.speaker: B
